resources.string: Describe what happened and what you expected instead

Your description and the device information shown below will be encrypted for the support team. The report is not linked to your wallet or app identity. Relays and network providers may still observe your IP address and submission time.
Report sent. A relay accepted the encrypted report.
The report was not accepted. Your text is still here; you can retry.
The description is too long. Maximum: 8,000 UTF-8 bytes.
Check the report information and try again.

Enabled by default. If the app terminates unexpectedly, it sends an encrypted report after the next launch containing the error category and app code locations. Exception messages, raw logs, wallet data, and identifiers are never included. Turn this off at any time.
